PostInstallAutomation.name: Firewall Harden
PostInstallAutomation.command: netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state on

PostInstallAutomation.name: Repo Health Check
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'RepoHealth' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem C:\\Repos -Directory | ForEach-Object { git -C $_.FullName status } | Out-File $env:OneDrive\\Reports\\RepoHealth.txt"' /sc weekly /d SUN /ru Connor

PostInstallAutomation.name: Anomaly Detection
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'AnomalyDetect' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "Get-Counter \\\"\\Processor(_Total)\\% Processor Time\\\" | Export-Csv $env:OneDrive\\Reports\\CPUTrend.csv"' /sc hourly /ru SYSTEM

PostInstallAutomation.name: Predictive Maintenance
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'PredictiveMaint' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "Get-PhysicalDisk | Get-StorageReliabilityCounter | Export-Csv $env:OneDrive\\Reports\\DiskHealth.csv"' /sc weekly /d SUN /ru SYSTEM

PostInstallAutomation.name: Adaptive Firewall Policies
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'AdaptiveFirewall' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "if ((Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq \"Up\"}).Name -like \"Wi-Fi\") { netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=BlockSMB dir=in action=block protocol=TCP localport=445 } else { netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=BlockSMB }"' /sc hourly /ru SYSTEM

PostInstallAutomation.name: Multi-Cloud Sync
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'CloudSync' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "rclone copy C:\\Winutil\\winutils.json onedrive:/ConnorOS && rclone copy C:\\Winutil\\winutils.json gdrive:/ConnorOS && aws s3 cp C:\\Winutil\\winutils.json s3://connoros-backups/winutils.json"' /sc daily /ru Connor

PostInstallAutomation.name: Hybrid Sync
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'HybridSync' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "git -C C:\\Winutil pull origin main"' /sc hourly /ru Connor

PostInstallAutomation.name: Containerized Deployment
PostInstallAutomation.command: schtasks /create /tn 'ContainerDeploy' /tr 'powershell.exe -Command "docker build -t connoros:latest C:\\Winutil && docker push connoros:
